summary: coral-wraith postinstall script exfiltrates host info and executes remote commands
details: The package's postinstall.js runs automatically on `npm install` and uses the `http`, `os`, and `child_process` modules to collect host identifiers (os.hostname(), process.cwd()) and issue HTTP GET requests together with `curl` invocations. The combination of system-info gathering, HTTP requests, and curl-based shell execution at install time matches the structural fingerprint of an install-time exfiltration / dropper payload, and fires automatically as a npm lifecycle hook with no user opt-in.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
